query:
SELECT mp.video_resolution as "res?"
            FROM items i
            JOIN media_parts mp ON mp.item_id = i.id AND mp.server_id = i.server_id
            WHERE i.guid = $1
              AND i.item_type = 'movie'
              AND mp.video_resolution IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY mp.video_resolution
            ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
            LIMIT 1
